scope: Capture-evidence extraction for Marcus Stone beginning at Mission:5514B18F. No implementation, SQL, runtime data, content pack, reward, dialogue, or quest logic changes.

notes: The official Marcus Stone identity remains SimpleChar:782DE567.
The 20260618 local server captures contain locally generated identities and were not used to redefine Marcus Stone.
The B18F handoff is in the Rex segment 20260614-194454. Marcus dialogue and the following mission slice are in 20260614-195107.

options: Actually, Rex said you could help me... I seem to have misplaced my Identity Card.

dialogueEvidence.event: follow-up answer list after selecting option 0
options: So, let me guess... You need some help with the fire?

dialogueEvidence.text: Drag and drop the item(s) you want to give to Marcus Stone into one of the slots available and press "accept"

options: Are those wounded workers your guys?
I'll do it, just tell me how.

dialogueEvidence.text: Marcus Stone: What're you looking at? Help me out here!

options: I healed one of your workers with the Health Regeneration Stim.

missionEvidence.title: Talk to Marcus Stone
missionEvidence.plainText: Rex Larsson told you to spreak with Marcus Stone, an overseer for arriving cargo in the area, might be able to aid in getting your license issue settled.

missionEvidence.title: Extinguish the Gas Fire
missionEvidence.objective: (Left Click) the Compact Fire Suppressant Container in your inventory to lift it up, then Left Click the Gas Fire to apply the fire suppressant.
missionEvidence.plainText: Marcus Stone mentioned that he may be able to assist you with your lack of identity on Rubi-Ka, but at a price. A recent accident on one of his landing pads has left cargo damaged and people injured. Bodies can heal while cargo cannot. Extinguish one of the Gas Fires that has errupted on the landing pad.

missionEvidence.title: Return to Marcus
missionEvidence.objective: Talk to Marcus Stone and hand him the Compact Fire Suppressant Container.
missionEvidence.plainText: After extinguishing one of the Gas Fires on Marcus' landing platform, he may be more willing to help you with your lack of identity.

missionEvidence.title: Talk to Flint Novak
missionEvidence.plainText: Marcus Stone told you to speak with Flint Novak, who oversees the local junkyard. He should be able to help with aquiring the parts for an ID card.

missionEvidence.title: Use the Stim on a Wounded Dockworker
missionEvidence.objective: Target a Wounded Dockworker and use the Health Regeneration Stim (Right-Click).
missionEvidence.plainText: Marcus Stone's workers got damaged by the fire, he asked you to help him save their lives.

missionEvidence.title: Return to Marcus Stone
missionEvidence.objective: Return to Marcus Stone and hand him the Health Regeneration Stim.
missionEvidence.plainText: Marcus Stone's workers got damaged by the fire, he asked you to help him save their lives.

remainingUnknowns: CharacterAction Action=59 appears immediately before mission deletes, but its gameplay semantics remain unresolved.
QuestMessage Action=Delete is confirmed as mission-window removal for specific missions, but broader gameplay semantics remain constrained to captured cleanup evidence.
Marcus B196 and B19A reward deltas are not fully proven by this extraction; only final Cash/XP stat values near completion were captured here.
TemplateAction item identities 296569, 291082, and 291043 were captured, but item names were not resolved in this extraction.
Inventory CSV for 20260614-195107 contains only a header, so item evidence comes from TemplateAction packets rather than inventory-updates.csv.
The exact Wounded Dockworker use packet should be extracted separately before implementing B199.
Quest action playfield and coordinate fields in decoded QuestFullUpdate bodies are captured but their runtime map semantics remain cautious.
